claimYield(uint256).notice: Claims LP yield only and burns the shares required to realize it.

claimableYieldOf(address).notice: Returns currently claimable profit above tracked principal.

depositLiquidity(uint256).notice: Adds LP liquidity and mints vault shares.

fundVault(uint256).notice: Adds collateral assets to the vault.

getAvailableLiquidity().notice: Returns unreserved assets that can currently be withdrawn by LPs.

getReservedAmount(uint256).notice: Returns reserved amount for a position.

lpAssetValue(address).notice: Returns current asset value for an LP position.

payClaim(uint256,address,uint256).notice: Pays a liquidation claim for a position.

previewDeposit(uint256).notice: Converts an asset deposit amount into LP shares.

previewRedeem(uint256).notice: Converts share amount into redeemable assets.

receivePremium(uint256).notice: Accepts premium income into vault assets.

redeemLiquidity(uint256).notice: Redeems vault shares for currently available assets.

releaseCapacity(uint256).notice: Releases reserved claim capacity for a position.

reserveCapacity(uint256,uint256).notice: Reserves claim capacity for a position.
